typePrompt: Create one original Multi-Light Chandelier. The product must function as a ceiling-mounted decorative chandelier with multiple light heads, designed for dining rooms, living rooms, bedrooms, villas, boutique hotels, designer residences, and high-end residential interiors. Emphasize multiple coordinated lamp heads, balanced arm structure, rhythmic spatial distribution, elegant ceiling suspension, strong visual identity, refined central body, beautiful proportions from all angles, and soft ambient illumination. The design may include 3-head, 5-head, 6-head, 8-head, or asymmetrical multi-light compositions, but all heads must belong to the same coherent product design. The lamp heads should feel visually connected through structure, material, proportion, and design language. Avoid random scattered bulbs, messy branch structures, overly complicated arms, excessive decoration, cheap online marketplace chandelier forms, and unrealistic floating components. The multi-light chandelier should feel sculptural, elegant, manufacturable, commercially viable, easy to assemble, suitable for packaging and installation, and ready for luxury residential market launch
